UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's credit balance and profile metadata in the studio.

credits.description: The current credits balance of the user.

email.description: The registered email of the user.

PaymentTransaction.title: PaymentTransaction
PaymentTransaction.description: Represents a UPI/UTR transaction submitted for credit top-up.

userId.description: UID or unique identifier of the payer.

utrNumber.description: The Bank UTR or Transaction ID inputted by the user.

status.description: The verification status of the transaction.

vpaPaid.description: The UPI ID (VPA) where the money was routed.

AutoPayMandate.title: AutoPayMandate
AutoPayMandate.description: Represents a recurring UPI AutoPay mandate / standing instruction registered by a user.

userId.description: UID or unique identifier of the user.

mandateId.description: The registered UPI AutoPay mandate reference ID.

limit.description: The upper price cap per recurring payment in INR.

creditsToAdd.description: Number of credits to automatically top-up.

platform.description: The UPI provider app used (gpay, phonepe, paytm, razorpay).

vpaPaid.description: The merchant VPA where recurring money is routed.

/user_profiles/{userId}.description: Stores current balance and details for registered users.

/payment_transactions/{transactionId}.description: Stores UPI transactions submitted by users with UTRs.

/autopay_mandates/{mandateDocId}.description: Stores registered recurring UPI AutoPay mandates.
